detaileddescription.para: This driver exists only to allow the SDK tools to create a memory test application and to populate xparameters.h with memory range constants.There is no source code. VER WHO DATE Changes 2.0 adk 19/12/13 Updated as per the New Tcl API's 2.1 ms 04/18/17 Modified tcl file to add suffix U for all macros definitions of mig_7series in xparameters.h
